items.title: Mysterious 2020 explosion in China had hallmarks of nuclear test, US official alleges
items.description: A US official says a seismic station in Kazakhstan collected evidence of an alleged China nuclear test at Lop Nur in June 2020.

items.title: Immigration judge blocks deportation of Columbia anti-Israel agitator
items.description: A federal judge blocked the Trump administration from deporting pro-Palestinian Columbia University protest leader due to a procedural error.
